title: Tender Turkish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Turkish lamb stew with a jammy and gooey texture, featuring sriracha and tempering chocolate, made in a traditional kazan cauldron.
instructions: Heat the kazan cauldron over medium heat and add the lamb cubes, cooking until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion to the cauldron and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic to the cauldron and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the sriracha, tempering chocolate, tomato paste, beef broth, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Remove the cauldron from the heat and let the stew cool slightly before serving.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
